scripts.dev:backend: pnpm backend:prepare && pnpm exec tsx packages/backend/src/server.ts
scripts.start:backend: node scripts/preflight-dev-ports.cjs backend && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= VSCODE_INSPECTOR_OPTIONS= pnpm dev:backend
scripts.start:web: node scripts/preflight-dev-ports.cjs web && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= VSCODE_INSPECTOR_OPTIONS= pnpm dev:web
scripts.start:bot: node scripts/preflight-dev-ports.cjs bot && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= VSCODE_INSPECTOR_OPTIONS= pnpm dev:bot
scripts.start:prod-test: pnpm backend:prepare && pnpm --filter @footnote/backend build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node server.js
scripts.dev:prod-test: concurrently "pnpm backend:prepare && pnpm --filter @footnote/backend build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node server.js" "pnpm --filter @footnote/web dev"
scripts.test:annotation-governance: pnpm exec tsx --test scripts/annotation-schema.test.ts scripts/validate-footnote-tags.test.ts scripts/review.test.ts
scripts.backend:prepare: pnpm --filter @footnote/config-spec run build:dev && pnpm --filter @footnote/prompts run build:dev
